---
title: "Luisa Sacristan"
categories: [MSc]
image: ../people-images/luisa-sacristan.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image: ../people-images/luisa-sacristan.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/alejandrocs_98
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/alejandrocs98
---

Hola soy Luisa.
